name: quickkart-automation
description: Complete Playwright automation framework for QuickKart application

scripts.allure:generate: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('allure-report/history')) fs.cpSync('allure-report/history', 'allure-results/history', {recursive: true})" && allure generate allure-results --clean
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
scripts.test:report: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); spawnSync('npx', ['playwright', 'test'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); spawnSync('npm', ['run', 'allure:report'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true });"
